ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist, data engineer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_acquisition" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data acquisition operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of data acquisition operation (e.g., load_data, read_csv) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., file path, API endpoint) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the acquired data */,
  "data_size" TEXT /* Size of the acquired data */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the acquired data (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "acquisition_status" TEXT /* Status of the acquisition (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_acquisition_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_preparation" (
  "prep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data preparation operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of data preparation operation (e.g., astype, one_hot) */,
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition operation the data is from */,
  "prep_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "prepped_data_path" TEXT /* File path to the prepped data */,
  "preparation_steps" TEXT /* List of preparation steps performed */,
  "preparation_status" TEXT /* Status of the preparation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "prepped_data_size" TEXT /* Size of the prepped data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preparation_acquisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("acquisition_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_preparation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modeling" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modeling operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of modeling operation (e.g., Add, AlphaDropout) */,
  "prep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data preparation operation the data is from */,
  "model_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "model_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model file */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., neural network, decision tree) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., created, trained) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modeling_prep_id FOREIGN KEY ("prep_id") REFERENCES data_preparation ("prep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modeling_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of training operation (e.g., fit, train_on_batch) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modeling operation the model is from */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "training_log_path" TEXT /* File path to the training log */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training */,
  "training_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "training_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics obtained during training (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES modeling ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation" (
  "eval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of evaluation operation (e.g., evaluate, roc_auc_score) */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training operation the model is from */,
  "eval_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics obtained from the evaluation (e.g., accuracy, ROC AUC score) */,
  "evaluation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "evaluation_metrics_details" TEXT /* Detailed metrics obtained during evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction" (
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of prediction operation (e.g., predict, predict_proba) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the modeling operation the model is from */,
  "pred_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "prediction_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the prediction file */,
  "prediction_status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "prediction_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the prediction */,
  "prediction_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics obtained during prediction (e.g., accuracy, ROC AUC score) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES modeling ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "misc_operations" (
  "misc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each miscellaneous operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation" TEXT /* Type of miscellaneous operation (e.g., imshow, title) */,
  "related_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related operation (e.g., evaluation_id, prediction_id) */,
  "misc_date" TEXT /* Date when the operation was performed */,
  "output_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the output file (e.g., plot image) */,
  "operation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the operation */,
  "operation_status" TEXT /* Status of the operation (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("misc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_misc_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the operation */,
  "operation_type" TEXT /* Type of operation (e.g., data_acquisition, data_preparation) */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation (e.g., acquisition_id, prep_id) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was generated */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, error, warning) */,
  "log_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the operation that generated the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration occurred */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., shared data, shared model) */,
  "collab_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being collaborated with */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
